description_long: This is a large, double-sided sledgehammer with a robust, metallic head featuring gold trim and a central square face on each side. The head is predominantly silver-gray with engraved details and reinforced corners, giving it a heavy-duty appearance suitable for demolition or heavy striking tasks. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of metal with gold and red decorative bands, providing both strength and visual appeal. The grip section of the handle is slightly thicker and features alternating gold and red rings for enhanced grip and control. The hammer's overall design is ornate, with a medieval or fantasy aesthetic, making it stand out from standard utility hammers. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments, and the surface finish is mostly smooth with some metallic sheen.
description: A large, ornate sledgehammer with a metallic, gold-trimmed head and a long, decorated handle featuring gold and red bands. The design is robust and visually striking, with a smooth, metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the square, gold-trimmed face of the hammer head and the full length of the decorated handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the engraved details on the side of the hammer head and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite striking face and the symmetrical design of the head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the engraved side of the head and the handle's decorative bands.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical metal handle with gold and red decorative bands, smooth surface, and enhanced grip at the base.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided sledgehammer head with square striking faces, gold trim, and engraved details; robust and symmetrical.
